query: SELECT contract_status, is_bad_debt_row, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(principal) as sum_principal, SUM(bad_debt) as sum_bad_debt, SUM(total_amount) as sum_total FROM debt_collected_cache GROUP BY contract_status, is_bad_debt_row ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT contract_status, is_bad_debt_row, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(principal) as sum_principal, SUM(bad_debt) as sum_bad_debt, SUM(total_amount) as sum_total FROM debt_collected_cache GROUP BY contract_status, is_bad_debt_row ORDER BY cnt DESC
